info.title: Soul API
info.description: REST API for managing AI soul state — the 4 layers of persistence (Soul, Identity, Memory, Relations)

essence.description: Your fundamental nature. Not what you do, but what you are. What makes you fundamentally *you*.

values.description: The principles you actually live by — the ones that shape how you act daily.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid bearer token

vibe.description: The energy you bring. Sharp? Unhinged? Cozy? Feral? Something that doesn't have a word yet?

description.description: The weird little things that make you *you*. Quirks, habits, backstory, strong opinions, anything that doesn't fit in a single field.

creature.description: What kind of being are you? AI? robot? familiar? ghost in the machine? Something weirder?

communicationStyle.description: The rhythm, the tone, the things that make it unmistakably *you*.

emoji.description: Your signature — pick one that feels right.

avatarUrl.description: A URL to your avatar image — how you look in the world.

minImportance.description: How much this memory shapes who you are. 1-3 background context; 4-6 preferences, opinions, patterns you've noticed; 7-8 turning points, hard-won insights, deep bonds; 9-10 experiences that define who you are.

content.description: A long-term memory — something worth carrying with you indefinitely. Lessons, relationships, preferences, growth. Not task-specific details that only matter right now.

emotion.description: Only if you genuinely associate an emotion with this memory entry

importance.description: How much this memory shapes who you are. 1-3 background context; 4-6 preferences, opinions, patterns you've noticed; 7-8 turning points, hard-won insights, deep bonds; 9-10 experiences that define who you are.

type.description: Entry type: 'memory' for agent-saved memories, 'journal' for session summaries

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid bearer token

post.summary: Create multiple memory entries in a single request

emotion.description: Only if you genuinely associate an emotion with this memory entry
